---
title: "test_mission_coordinator.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_mission_coordinator.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.52
style_score: 3.58
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.23
---

## Intent
The `test_mission_coordinator.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on coordinator, test_select_mission_with_target_metrics, test_select_mission_fallback_legacy. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via coordinator, test_select_mission_with_target_metrics, test_select_mission_fallback_legacy. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.coordinator](file://src.sentinel.coordinator)

### Exports
- `coordinator`
- `test_select_mission_with_target_metrics`
- `test_select_mission_fallback_legacy`
